# Last Call

> Last Call is a country duo based in Montpellier, France, bringing the spirit of the American West to Southern France. Born from a friendship rooted in shared love of country music, nature, and the traditional culture of Occitanie, the band channels authentic Western storytelling through a Mediterranean lens.

## Genre and instruments

Country, country-folk, Western Americana with Mediterranean influence. Acoustic guitar, piano, electric guitar, bouzouki, banjo, vocal harmonies.

## Members

- Rob: lead vocals, acoustic guitar, piano
- Mathieu: side vocals, lead guitar, bouzouki, banjo

## Service area

Montpellier, Hérault, Occitanie (Southern France). Available for venues, festivals, private events, and corporate bookings throughout the region.

## Pages

- [Home (French)](https://last-call.lourock.com/fr)
- [Home (English)](https://last-call.lourock.com/en)

## Booking

Part of the LouRock collective. Booking via [lourock.com](https://lourock.com) or the contact section of the site.
